pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version is not updated.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and JHipster dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Boot versions may not support Java 21 features or may have compatibility issues with updated dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a snapshot version compatible with the new build environment.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions might not be compatible with the new JDK or Maven plugin ecosystem.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven Checkstyle plugin to a snapshot version.
Upgrade Maven Compiler plugin to a snapshot version.
Upgrade Maven War plugin to a snapshot version.
Replace Jackson JAXB annotations module with Jakarta XML Bind annotations module for Java EE to Jakarta EE migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind package was removed in Java 11 and replaced with jakarta.xml.bind in Jakarta EE 9+. Using the old module will cause runtime errors or missing class exceptions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit dependency on jakarta.annotation-api as it is now provided by Spring Boot or other dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Redundant dependency management; Spring Boot 3.x manages this transitively.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the release flag for Java 9+ cross-compilation support.
pom.xml.why_exists: The source and target options are deprecated in favor of the release option in modern Java compilers. While not strictly a compile error, it is the correct modern practice and required for proper module path handling in newer JDKs.

src/main/java/md/utm/restaurant/config/C.general_idea: Replace legacy List.get(0) call with the Java 21 List.getFirst() method for cleaner syntax.

src/main/java/md/utm/restaurant/config/W.general_idea: Refactor instanceof check to use pattern matching for cleaner code.
src/main/java/md/utm/restaurant/config/W.before:
if (request instanceof ServletServerHttpRequest) {
                    ServletServerHttpRequest servletRequest = (ServletServerHttpRequest) request;
